title: Rename+
description: This mod allows you to rename mobs and items without needing name tags or anvils with sleek UI!
body: This lightweight mod lets you rename any mob or item directly in-game with a clean, intuitive user interface-no nametags, anvils, or experience costs required. The default keybinds are R for renaming mobs and X for items. To rename a mob, just look at it and press the keybind and to rename an item, hold it in your main hand and press the other keybind.
